name: Chocolate Marshmallow Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first three ingredients in a saucepan and cook to 234°F or until it forms a soft ball when tested with cold water.
2. Stir constantly until the desired temperature is reached.
3. Remove from heat and gradually fold in the remaining ingredients.
4. If desired, add chopped nuts.
5. Pour the mixture into a greased 8 x 13 inch pan.
6. Refrigerate until firm.
7. Cut into squares.
